title: A Long Layover
content: Marcus faced a ten-hour layover between flights at a major international airport. Initially, the long wait seemed frustrating, but he decided to make the most of it. He explored different terminals, sampled food from several restaurants, and visited observation areas where travelers could watch airplanes. He also spent time reading and catching up on messages. Surprisingly, the hours passed more quickly than expected. By the time his next flight was ready for boarding, Marcus no longer viewed the layover as wasted time. Instead, it had become an interesting part of the journey itself.
